headline: SpaceX Investor Powerlaw Debuts on Nasdaq as IPO Race Heats Up
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Powerlaw Corp., a closed-end fund that owns stakes in Elon Musk’s SpaceX and artificial intelligence firm OpenAI, traded well above the value of its underlying investments in its debut on Wednesday, capitalizing on retail investors’ clamor for exposure to the hottest private tech companies.Most Read from BloombergIran’s Khamenei Says No Going Back for Middle East Rocked by WarSingapore Hands Byju's Founder His First Ever Jail TermPutin Signs Law on Use of Army to Aid Russians Deta
